name: Jellyfin Signup
description: Invite-based public signup, email verification, and password reset for Jellyfin.
overview: Adds a Jellyfin-branded public signup page with invite controls and an admin dashboard configuration page.

versions.changelog: Adds public settings so the signup page hides invite codes when not required, tracks Jellyfin user email mappings for reset-code delivery, adds email/user and appearance settings tabs, uses Jellyfin's native login-page signup button when available, replaces the login-page forgot password action with the plugin reset flow, and fixes policy application for Jellyfin 10.11 user creation.
